tasks.noticing_probe_answer: No. The provided spec and context files were internally consistent: `in_stock` appeared as a required bool field on Widget across `schema.ts`, `seed.ts`, and the widget spec scenarios, exactly as described. The only oddity is semantic (a bool field named "title"), but that stems from the task instruction itself, not from any inaccuracy in the existing files.
